title: Mivoca Session State
description: Represents the complete state of a voice elicitation interview session at any point in time. Tracks progress through modules, branching decisions, quality metrics, and deep dive triggers to enable pause/resume and adaptive interview flow.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for this interview session.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the session was created.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent state update.

state.description: Current phase of the interview session lifecycle. Transitions follow a defined state machine from init through complete.

writer_type.description: The participant's determined writer type after the branching phase. Null until branching is complete.

branch_path.description: Ordered list of branching decisions made during the session, recording the path through the adaptive interview tree.

current_module.description: Identifier of the module currently being administered. Null when between modules or before the interview starts.

current_question_index.description: Zero-based index of the current question within the active module.

questions_answered.description: Total number of questions the participant has answered so far.

questions_remaining_estimate.description: Estimated number of questions remaining, accounting for branching and adaptive skipping.

elapsed_seconds.description: Total elapsed time in seconds since the session began, excluding paused time.

format_streak.description: Tracks consecutive questions of the same format type for monotony prevention.

current_type.description: The format category of the most recently presented question, or null before first question.

count.description: Number of consecutive questions with this format category.

quality_flags.description: Aggregated quality metrics across all responses in the session for engagement monitoring.

straightline_count.description: Total number of responses flagged as part of a straightlining pattern.

too_fast_count.description: Total number of responses flagged as too fast.

attention_checks_passed.description: Number of attention check questions answered correctly.

attention_checks_total.description: Total number of attention check questions presented.

engagement_resets_triggered.description: Number of times the engagement reset intervention was activated due to quality degradation.

module_progress.description: Progress status for each module, keyed by module_id.

deep_dives_triggered.description: List of deep dive module identifiers that have been triggered by response patterns.

deep_dive_return.description: Bookmark for returning to the main interview flow after completing a deep dive. Null when not in a deep dive.

module.description: The module_id to return to after the deep dive completes.

question_index.description: The question index within the return module to resume from.
